response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud infrastructure, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, API integrations, and open-source tooling demonstrates exceptional technical depth and ownership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling experience
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic in a Berlin-based role
Extensive project history may suggest fragmented focus
